acip Directory Reference(3) Library Functions Manual acip Directory Reference(3)

NAME

acip Directory Reference

SYNOPSIS

Files


file acds_client.c
file acds_handlers.c
ACIP Discovery Server (ACDS) packet handlers with O(1) dispatch. file acds_server.c
file client.c
ACIP client-side protocol implementation. file handlers.c
ACIP protocol packet handlers implementation. file send.c
ACIP protocol packet sending functions (transport-agnostic). file server.c
ACIP server-side protocol implementation.
